title: Hyperlapse

body:
Last weekend when we were in Palm Springs, I downloaded the new from Instagram app, Hyperlapse. Have you tried it yet? It's a free app that allows you to create neat time lapse videos with your iPhone. I gave it a go for the first time in this video while Jack was napping.

Then I decided it would be more fun to include Jack after he woke up. I set the iPhone down in front of him and hit record while he was having some lunch. You probably won't find him eating nearly as amusing as I do, but I thought I would share it anyway. And yes, that is a very big sneeze indeed right around the 55 second mark of the video.
